actions.script:
def dynamicFind = ec.entity.find("Party").makeEntityDynamicView() dynamicFind.addMemberEntity("p" ,Party,null,null,null) dynamicFind.addMemberEntity("pr" ,PartyRole,Party,true,["PartyId":PartyId]) dynamicFind.addMemberEntity("pp" ,Person,PartyRole,true,["PartyId" : PartyId]) dynamicFind.addMemberEntity("pcm" ,PartyContactMech,Person,true,["PartyId":PartyId]) dynamicFind.addMemberEntity("cm" ,ContactMech,PartyContactMech,true,["ContactMechID":ContactMechID]) dynamicFind.addMemberEntity("tn" , TelecomNumber , ContactMech , true , ["ContactMechID":ContactMechID])
dynamicFind.addAlias("p", "partyId") dynamicFind.addAlias("pp", "firstName") dynamicFind.addAlias("pp", "lastName") dynamicFind.addAlias("cm", "infoString") dynamicFind.addAlias("tn", "contactNumber") dynamicFind.addAlias("pr", "roleTypeId") dynamicFind.condition("roleTypeId", "Customer") <!-- dynamicFind.condition("createdStamp", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.GREATER_THAN_EQUAL_TO, "")--> <!-- dynamicFind.condition("createdStamp", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.LESS_THAN, "")--> customerList = dynamicFind.list()
